exploration_notes: The API key authentication in Grafana follows this flow: (1) **ContextHandler middleware** (`pkg/services/contexthandler/contexthandler.go`) intercepts all HTTP requests and calls `authenticator.Authenticate()` to identify the caller. (2) The **authn registration** (`pkg/services/authn/authnimpl/registration.go`) registers the API key client via `clients.ProvideAPIKey()`. (3) The **API key authn client** (`pkg/services/authn/clients/api_key.go`) is the core implementation — it extracts the token
